belongs_to_collection.name: In the Mood for Love Collection

movie.overview: Two neighbors form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic so as not to commit similar wrongs.
movie.tagline: Feel the heat, keep the feeling burning, let the sensation explode.
movie.title: In the Mood for Love
